allow: Bash(git add analysis_curve_pattern.py analysis_nonlinear_ceiling.py analysis_nonlinear_reverse_engineer.py analysis_reverse_engineer_paper.py outputs/figures/analysis_damping_effect.png outputs/figures/analysis_separation_effect.png outputs/figures/paper_originals/ outputs/original_paper.pdf)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
chore: Add analysis scripts and original paper reference materials

Analysis scripts used during reproduction process:
- analysis_curve_pattern.py: Investigated influence space curve patterns
- analysis_nonlinear_ceiling.py: Explored ceiling behavior in non-separable datasets
- analysis_nonlinear_reverse_engineer.py: Reverse-engineered paper''s dataset parameters
- analysis_reverse_engineer_paper.py: Analyzed original paper figures for matching

Generated analysis figures:
- analysis_damping_effect.png: Effect of Hessian damping on influence scores
- analysis_separation_effect.png: Effect of cluster separation on ceiling behavior

Original paper reference materials:
- outputs/original_paper.pdf: Original arXiv paper for reference
- outputs/figures/paper_originals/: Extracted figures from paper for comparison

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
